_comment: XMclaw Daemon Configuration — copy to config.json and fill in your API keys

llm._comment: openai/anthropic/openrouter blocks define the 'default' profile (id='default') the daemon picks when a chat session doesn't specify one. The first block with an api_key wins (anthropic > openai > openrouter — native APIs first, OpenRouter as the fallback). profiles[] adds named alternatives — chat header dropdown lets the user route each session through one of them. Restart the daemon after editing. ('default_provider' field was removed B-304: factory.py auto-detects from filled api_keys; setting it had no effect since B-146.)
llm._comment_context_length_help: Wave 27 fix-6 (2026-05-15): 每个 provider 块都可选填 'context_length' (整数 token 数) — 用来声明你这个 base_url 后面接的模型真正的上下文窗口。压缩器会按这个数算阈值 (默认 85%) + 尾部保留预算 (默认 20%)。三层解析优先级：(1) 这里写的 context_length 最高 — 任何 3rd-party portal (api.minimaxi.com / OpenRouter / 自建 vLLM) 都能用，无需修代码；(2) 内置静态表自动识别 Claude/GPT/Kimi/Qwen/Gemini/DeepSeek 主流模型；(3) 动态 ratchet — 每次 LLM 成功返回的 prompt_tokens 都会抬高估值，未知模型经过 1-2 轮自我校准。所以一般留空即可，只有跑罕见 / 私有模型才需要显式写。
llm._comment_openrouter: B-386: OpenRouter (https://openrouter.ai) — single key, 200+ models. Model id is '<provider>/<model>' (e.g. 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4', 'openai/gpt-4o', 'meta-llama/llama-3.1-70b-instruct'). XMclaw automatically attaches HTTP-Referer + X-Title attribution headers so calls show up in your OpenRouter dashboard. Prompt-cache auto-detect: on for anthropic/* + openai/* prefixes, off for everything else.
llm._comment_profiles_schema: each entry: {id (slug, [a-z0-9][a-z0-9_-]*), label?, provider (anthropic|openai|openrouter), model, api_key, base_url?}. Empty by default; manage via Settings page or edit here directly.

skills._comment: Epic #27 G-04 (2026-05-19) — skill 工具暴露的渐进披露 (progressive disclosure)。disclosure_mode 决定 LLM 一回合看到几个 skill 工具：'inline' = 每个注册 skill 单独一个 skill_<id> 工具（受 prefilter top-12 收窄，legacy 行为）；'unified' = 只暴露 6 个 meta-tool (browse / view / status / install / uninstall / run)，所有调用走 skill_run(skill_id, args)，强制 LLM 走显式 browse→view→run 三步流程，大库下显著省 prompt token 预算；'auto' = 默认，注册 skill 数 > unified_threshold (默认 20) 时自动切 unified，否则保持 inline 的直接调用便利。

evolution._comment: Epic #4 + Sprint 3 honest-disclosure: ``enabled`` defaults to true as of Phase 1 (2026-05-20). ``auto_apply`` defaults to true as of B-387 (2026-05-29) — skills auto-promote when evidence passes the HonestGrader gate. Set auto_apply=false to keep promotion human-gated (``xmclaw evolve approve <id>``).

scheduler._comment: Sprint 3 #3 sleep-time agent (Letta pattern) — when ``idle_aware=true`` the daemon polls the OS idle interface every ``poll_interval_s`` seconds and fires sleep-time tasks (memory dedup at the short edge, skill dream / mutation at the long edge) AFTER the user has stopped working. Heavy compaction never collides with active turns on the SQLite WAL. Cron-based triggers still fire — idle-aware firing layers an additional trigger on top, whichever crosses first. Set false to revert to today's cron-only behaviour. Detector picks: Windows GetLastInputInfo (stdlib ctypes) / macOS IOHIDIdleTime (requires pyobjc — pip install 'xmclaw[idle-macos]') / Linux xprintidle or systemd loginctl IdleHint. Unsupported platforms fall through to ``always idle`` so behaviour matches today.

dream._comment_b51: B-51 Auto-Dream — daily LLM-driven MEMORY.md compaction (CoPaw parity). Reads MEMORY.md + last N daily logs, asks the LLM to dedupe + crystallise + drop stale entries, writes back. Backs up old version under <persona>/backup/ first. Off when no LLM is configured. Set enabled=false to skip even with LLM wired.

memory._comment_b41: B-41 vector index — when 'embedding' is configured, the daemon auto-indexes MEMORY.md / USER.md / memory/*.md AND the user's web-UI memory editor notes into the sqlite-vec store so memory_search returns real semantic hits. Without an embedding key the indexer is silently disabled and memory_search falls back to keyword scan.
memory._comment_ollama_example: For local Ollama: base_url='http://127.0.0.1:11434/v1', api_key may be empty (localhost is auth-free in our client). Recommended: model='qwen3-embedding:0.6b' dim=1024 (multilingual, fast). Alternatives: 'bge-m3' dim=1024, 'nomic-embed-text' dim=768. Pull first: 'ollama pull qwen3-embedding:0.6b'.
memory._comment_b210: B-210 workspace code indexing — list of directories to chunk and embed alongside persona/journal. Each path is filtered by the indexer's denylist (.git / node_modules / __pycache__ / .venv / dist / build) and an extension allowlist (.py .js .ts .md .rs .go .java .json .toml .yaml .sql + others). Empty / missing → no code indexing. memory_search(kind='code_chunk') retrieves these.

memory._comment: Workspace indexing (sqlite-vec): file_chunk + code_chunk rows written by MemoryFileIndexer for memory_search retrieval over MEMORY.md / USER.md / workspace_paths. **Phase 7 (2026-05-24)**: user-facing facts (lessons / preferences / identity / persona_manual) moved to V2 LanceDB — see cognition.memory_v2. The settings here govern ONLY workspace indexing storage. db_path defaults to ~/.xmclaw/v2/memory.db. ttl is seconds-per-layer (null = no TTL). pinned_tags / retention apply to workspace chunks. Set enabled=false to disable the workspace indexer entirely.

retention._comment: max_items / max_bytes per layer (null = unbounded). sweep_interval_s throttles the background task. prune_by_ttl triggers age-based prune on every tick.

tools._comment: Optional sandbox + per-family kill-switches. With NO tools section (or this empty shape), the agent gets full user-level filesystem, shell, and web access -- the default local-assistant posture. Add allowed_dirs to restrict filesystem tools to specific paths; set enable_bash / enable_web to false to disable those families.
tools._comment_browser: 2026-05-14 default-on. Playwright-backed headless browser — 7 工具: browser_open / browser_click / browser_fill / browser_screenshot / browser_snapshot / browser_eval / browser_close。比 enable_web 单一 GET 强得多，能跑 SPA、操作表单、自动登录、截图取证。第一次用必须先：``pip install 'xmclaw[browser]'`` 再 ``playwright install chromium``（下载 ~150MB Chromium 二进制，只跑一次）。没装 chromium 也不 crash daemon — 7 个工具不出现在列表里就行了。allowed_hosts=null 让 agent 去任何域名；填 list 限制域。headless=false 看着浏览器跑（调试用）。download_dir=null 禁下载（默认）；填路径开下载。
tools._comment_composio: B-389 (Sprint 2) Composio bridge — 7000+ pre-integrated SaaS tools (Gmail, Slack, GitHub, Notion, Linear, HubSpot, …) exposed as agent tools. enabled=false by default. To use: 1) pip install 'xmclaw[tools-composio]'; 2) sign up at https://app.composio.dev → Settings → API keys → copy the ck_live_... key into api_key; 3) authorise each app (Gmail OAuth / Slack OAuth / …) in the Composio dashboard; 4) list the slug in apps[] (uppercase, e.g. GMAIL / SLACK / GITHUB / NOTION). entity_id='default' for single-user installs. cache_ttl_s caps tool-list refetches to once per N seconds (default 300). XMclaw NEVER initiates OAuth — that's Composio's CLI / dashboard step.
tools._comment_computer_use: 2026-05-12 桌面自动化 — 给 agent 装上鼠标键盘 + 屏幕截图。2026-05-14 default-on (默认 true) — agent 能操作微信 / Office / VSCode / 任何本地软件。11 个工具：screen_capture / screen_size / cursor_position / mouse_{move,click,drag,scroll} / keyboard_{type,press} / window_{list,focus}。依赖：``pip install pyautogui mss pygetwindow``（macOS 还要在系统设置 → 隐私 → 辅助功能 / 屏幕录制里给终端授权；Linux 需要 X11 会话）。FAILSAFE 永远开着：把鼠标拽到屏幕左上角 (0,0) 会立即中止 agent 任何 GUI 动作。screenshot_dir 默认是 ~/.xmclaw/v2/screenshots；base64_size_cap 是截图内嵌进 LLM context 的字节数上限（超出只返路径，不嵌 base64）。要关掉就 enabled=false。
tools._comment_media: 2026-05-12 媒体工具 — 录音、拍照、放音频。2026-05-14 default-on。依赖 sounddevice / opencv-python / simpleaudio（``pip install xmclaw[media]``，部分平台 / 设备首次调用会触发系统权限弹窗）。缺包时工具列出但 invoke 返结构化 error。
tools._comment_subagent_fanout: 2026-05-12 并行子 agent — 给主 agent 加 `parallel_subagents` 工具，让它把独立子任务一次性 fan out 到 N 个临时 agent 并行跑（Kimi K2.6 swarm 模式）。2026-05-14 default-on — 多任务 + 多研究问题场景下能 5-10x 缩短墙钟时间。

voice._comment: B-388 voice MVP — STT (speech→text) + TTS (text→speech). Both blocks are optional; omit to disable that direction. Requires the optional extra: pip install 'xmclaw[voice]' (or [voice-stt] / [voice-tts] for half). Default STT is faster-whisper local model 'tiny' (~75 MB, runs on any laptop CPU); default TTS is Microsoft Edge's free voice service (zh-CN-XiaoxiaoNeural, no API key). Synthesized audio lands at ~/.xmclaw/v2/audio/<uuid>.mp3.

stt._comment: model: tiny | base | small | medium | large-v3 (size order; bigger = more accurate + slower + bigger first-run download). device: cpu | cuda. compute_type: int8 (lightest) | int8_float16 | float16 | float32. language: ISO-639-1 hint (zh / en / ja / …) or null for auto-detect.

tts._comment: voice: any edge-tts voice id. Chinese: zh-CN-XiaoxiaoNeural (female default), zh-CN-YunxiNeural (male), zh-CN-XiaoyiNeural (female warm). English: en-US-AriaNeural, en-US-JennyNeural, en-GB-SoniaNeural. rate / volume: '+0%' = natural; '+15%' = faster, '-25%' = quieter, etc.

runtime._comment: Epic #3: which SkillRuntime executes forked skills. 'local' = in-process asyncio task + CPU-timeout; good for dev + conformance tests. 'process' = separate OS process via multiprocessing.spawn; real SIGKILL + import isolation + crash containment; fs/net/memory are still advisory (see providers/runtime/process.py). 'docker' (B-385) = container per skill — real fs/net/memory sandbox via kernel cgroups + namespaces; requires `pip install 'xmclaw[sandbox-docker]'` and a running Docker daemon. Default is 'local'; production with trusted skills set 'process'; production running user-evolved / low-trust skills set 'docker'.
runtime._comment_docker: Only read when backend='docker'. All fields optional; defaults are the most-restrictive combination. image: container image ref (default python:3.10-slim, pulled on first fork). network_mode='none' = isolated, 'bridge' = host-attached. mem_limit/cpu_quota/cpu_period are kernel-enforced caps. read_only=true mounts the container fs read-only (skill can only write under tmpfs /tmp). timeout_s is the wall-clock cap; manifest.max_cpu_seconds wins when smaller.

_consumer_note: B-304 sections below ('backup', 'mcp_servers', 'channels', 'integrations', 'gateway') are read by daemon lifespan + adapter loaders, NOT by xmclaw/daemon/factory.py. Keys here are descriptive; real validation happens in the consuming subsystem at startup. Daemon restart required for any of these.

gateway._consumer: lifespan (uvicorn host/port binding); also where the daemon picks --port if --port flag not passed (B-305).

agent._comment_b190: B-190: agent loop limits. max_hops caps the LLM⇄tool round-trips per turn (default 40). Audit-style tasks calling many list_dir/file_read may need 60-80; set higher and restart the daemon. Hitting the cap returns a friendly truncation message rather than a silent crash.

security._comment: Epic #14: prompt-injection policy applied to untrusted tool output before it re-enters the LLM context. Accepts: 'detect_only' (log, pass through), 'redact' (replace matched spans with [redacted:<pattern_id>]), 'block' (abort the turn with ANTI_REQ_VIOLATION). Defaults to 'detect_only'.
security._comment_guardians: Epic #3: pre-execution tool security. enabled=false (default) skips all guardian scans; enabled=true wraps every tool call with FilePathToolGuardian + RuleBasedToolGuardian + ShellEvasionGuardian. The optional 'policy' map controls what happens at each severity: 'allow' passes through, 'approve' creates a pending approval (NEEDS_APPROVAL:<id>), 'deny' blocks immediately. Defaults: critical=deny, high=approve, medium/low/info=allow. Tighten by moving entries up (e.g. medium=approve) or loosen for dev (e.g. high=allow — not recommended).

backup._comment: Epic #20 Phase 2: daemon runs a daily workspace backup when auto_daily=true. Default false — 备份费磁盘且用户多数有自己的备份方案，按需开。Prefix-scoped prune 不碰手工 `xmclaw backup create <name>` 备份。interval_s 是备份间隔秒数 (86400 = 24h)。

mcp_servers._consumer: lifespan (MCP registry); not in factory.py. On Windows: requires `npx` on PATH for official @modelcontextprotocol/server-* packages — install Node.js first.

cognition._comment: Jarvisification 认知架构 — Epic #25 完成后默认全 ON（autonomy_level 从 0 翻到 50，之前的保守姿态被显式撤销 2026-05-09）。enabled=true 启用 Phase 1-5 mechanics（CognitiveState / MemoryGraph / TaskScheduler / FileWatcher / EvolutionLoop）。continuous_loop.enabled=true 进一步打开 Phase 6/R1-R6（PerceptionBus + AttentionFilter + ReasoningEngine + Planner + GoalGenerator + SelfExperimentLoop + CognitiveDaemon heartbeat + ReflectionCycle + MetaCognitionPass + Multi-modal watchers + SuggestionInbox）。autonomy_level=50 默认 = 主动提示但不替你执行（建议进 SuggestionInbox 待审批）；要自主行动翻 75+（启用 self-experiments）/ 100（full Jarvis，要 double-confirm + audit log）；要回到只观察不动作翻 0。要完全关回 Phase 5 之前行为，把 enabled 设 false。

memory_v2._comment: Wave 27 / Memory v2 — Fact/Relation + LanceDB-backed L1 + 确定性 KeyInfoExtractor。enabled=true 后：每条用户消息自动扫 URL/账号/密码/数字目标/'记住 X' 等模式，落到 ~/.xmclaw/v2/facts/ (LanceDB)。Agent 不需要主动调 remember 工具。详见 JARVIS_PLAN §1.4 + Phase 7。**2026-05-19 默认翻 true** (Epic #27 G-08 follow-up)——用户实测发现 facts 在 LanceDB 里但 render_for_prompt 因 scope filter 把它们漏掉了，agent 不知道自己叫什么；同 commit 修了 filter + 让 BOOTSTRAP.md 短路尊重已有 identity facts。需要 pip install 'xmclaw[memory-v2]'（带 lancedb + pyarrow）。
memory_v2._comment_recall: Phase 7.A.3 (2026-05-23): top_k controls how many V2 facts AgentLoop.run_turn injects into the prompt via <memory-recall> per turn. Lowered from V1's default 10 to 5 — V2 facts are typed (Fact+kind+scope) so each carries more signal than a raw V1 row; 5 is enough for most chats without spending prompt budget.
memory_v2._comment_retention: Phase 7.B.1 (2026-05-24): periodic sweep on the v2 facts store. sweep_interval_s=0 disables. Default mirrors V1 memory.retention so existing users don't see a behaviour change at migration. ttl per layer (seconds-per-layer; null = no TTL); max_items / max_bytes are LRU caps. ``identity`` + ``persona_manual`` kinds are always exempt regardless of layer (matches V1 pinned_tags). ``procedural`` layer is exempt from every axis — skill / persona facts outlive aging policies by design. **Memory v3 phase 4 (2026-05-28)** adds an auto-dedup tick on top of the retention loop: every ``dedup_every_n_sweeps`` retention cycles, the loop also runs ``MemoryService.dedup_scope(dry_run=False)`` across ``dedup_scopes``. Default fires once per day (24 hourly sweeps); set ``dedup_every_n_sweeps=0`` to disable while still running TTL/cap sweep. The agent can also trigger dedup manually via the ``memory_dedup`` and ``memory_inspect(auto_dedup=true)`` tools.
memory_v2._comment_llm_dedup: Memory convergence (2026-05-29): vector dedup (dedup_every_n_sweeps, cosine ≥ 0.86) only collapses near-identical re-phrasings — paraphrases of the same rule ('空消息超3轮停止分析' said 7-8 different ways) survive forever and the store never converges. ``llm_dedup_every_n_sweeps`` runs an LLM SEMANTIC dedup pass on top: it asks the aux/fast-tier model to cluster entries that MEAN the same thing regardless of wording, then supersedes the duplicates. Default 0 = OFF (opt-in) because it spends tokens autonomously (one LLM call per ~60 facts per scope). Requires an LLM wired to the memory service (auto-wired from the agent's fast tier at boot). Recommended value if you want auto-convergence: 168 (once a week if sweep_interval is hourly), or run it manually any time via the memory_dedup tool with mode='llm'.
memory_v2._comment_curator: Phase 8 (2026-05-30): MemoryCurator — holistic memory gardening (dedup + prune + 矛盾检测 + 语义结晶) in ONE time-budgeted run, scheduled by a WALL-CLOCK timestamp persisted to ~/.xmclaw/v2/curator_state.json. This REPLACES the old retention.dedup_every_n_sweeps / llm_dedup_every_n_sweeps ticks (those reset their counter on every daemon restart and in practice never fired — the root cause behind '向量 dedup 以前也是这个但没用'). The curator decides 'is curation due?' by real elapsed time, so a daemon that bounces 48×/day still curates exactly once per interval_s. LLM passes (contradict/crystallize) auto-skip when no LLM is wired to the memory service. announce=true sends an HONEST proactive message ('刚整理了记忆：已合并 X 条…') ONLY when real work happened — never a no-op claim. Set enabled=false to disable; the agent can still run memory_dedup manually. See docs/audit/MEMORY_SYSTEMS_SOTA_RESEARCH_2026.md (Letta sleep-time agents = the same idea).
memory_v2._comment_write_decision: Phase 8 ⑨ (2026-05-30): Mem0-style write-time memory decision (arXiv:2504.19413). When enabled, the BACKGROUND fact extractor routes each candidate fact through remember_with_decision(): it fetches the nearest existing memories and asks the LLM to choose ADD (new info) / UPDATE (merge into a more complete existing fact) / DELETE (new fact contradicts an old one → old is time-failed via invalid_at, kept for history) / NOOP (already known → evidence-vote). This is the head-of-field approach (vs cleaning up duplicates in an offline sweep afterwards) and is the real fix for the store accumulating duplicates. Cost-bounded: the LLM is consulted ONLY when a candidate has a genuinely close neighbour (cosine distance ≤ 0.40); a fact with no close neighbour is a pure ADD with no extra LLM call. Falls back to plain remember() when no LLM/embedder is wired, so it's always safe. Runs in the background extractor path only (NOT the synchronous KeyInfoExtractor regex path), so it never adds latency to a user turn. Set enabled=false to revert to blind remember()+offline curator. See docs/audit/MEMORY_SYSTEMS_SOTA_RESEARCH_2026.md §⑨.

cognition._comment_auto_recall: Memory v3 phase 2 (2026-05-28): per-turn similarity recall against the LanceDB store. Runs BEFORE the LLM call on the user-turn critical path, so it's **OFF by default** — turning it on adds an embedding call + LanceDB query (~100–500ms typical) to every turn. When enabled, results are prepended to the user message itself (NOT the system prompt) as a ``<recalled>`` block, so prompt-cache hits stay intact. Hard-bounded by ``timeout_s`` (default 1.0s) — if recall stalls, the turn proceeds without it. ``use_hybrid=true`` fuses BM25 + vector via ``MemoryService.recall_hybrid`` (requires ``pip install 'xmclaw[memory-bm25]'``); defaults to vector-only because the current Python-side BM25 rebuild is per-query (LanceDB native FTS lands in Phase 5). The agent can also call ``memory_search`` explicitly any time.

context_compression._comment: Wave 27 fix-6 (2026-05-15)：上下文压缩 = 按 token 预算压，不按消息条数压。模型上下文窗口三层解析：(1) llm.<provider>.context_length 配置覆盖（最高优先级 — 任何 endpoint 都能用，无需代码改动）；(2) 静态表 _provider_profiles.get_model_context_length() — 主流模型自动识别；(3) 动态 ratchet — 每次 LLM 成功返回的 prompt_tokens 都会抬高估值，所以未注册的模型经过 1-2 轮就自我校准。压缩规则：触发后保留头 N 条（系统提示 / 开局）+ 尾部 token_budget 字节原文 + 中间压成 summary。protect_last_ratio 是核心 — 取上下文窗口的 % 作为尾部预算（默认 20%），所以 1M 窗模型保留 ~150K 原文 / 256K 模型保留 ~51K / 32K 模型保留 ~6K。protect_last_n 是整数地板（默认 5），防小窗模型尾部一条都没。

continuous_loop._comment_phase_6: Phase 6 持续认知循环。1Hz 心跳排空 PerceptionBus、计算 salience、按 autonomy_level 决定是否动作。autonomy_level: 0=只观察、50=主动提示不动作（默认）、75+=允许 self-experiments、100=full Jarvis。详见 docs/JARVIS_PHASE_6_DESIGN.md §4 + DEV_ROADMAP Epic #25。

proactive._comment: Sprint 1-2 proactive triggers — agent 主动发声（不是用户问才答）。enabled=true 后台 ProactiveAgent.tick() 30s 一次扫所有 trigger，命中 + 不在冷却 + 不在勿扰窗口 → 发 PROACTIVE_PROPOSAL event。前端 web UI 自动收，channel_push 配了的话同步推到飞书/TG/Slack。
proactive._calendar_ics_path_help: Wave 5: 指向你导出的 .ics 文件路径（Outlook/iCal/Google Calendar 都能导）。CalendarReminderTrigger 默认提前 5min 提醒，2min 内 urgency=high。空 = 不启用日历触发器。
proactive._cron_jobs_help: Wave 11: 按 cron 表达式定时发声。schedule 支持 'every 5m' / 'every 1h' / 'every 1d'（无依赖）或完整 cron '0 8 * * *'（要 pip install croniter）。message 是固定文本，到点直接发给 Web UI 和已订阅的飞书/TG。每个 job 自带 name（用于冷却 + /disabled 控制）。坏 schedule 跳过不 crash。

cron_jobs._example_only_comment: 把 enabled 之外的 job 注释掉或删掉再启用。下面 3 个是示例，按需改。
cron_jobs.name: morning_briefing
cron_jobs.message: ☀️ 早安。要不要把今天日历和未完任务过一下？

cron_jobs.name: evening_review
cron_jobs.message: 🌙 今天搞了啥？要不要我帮你过一遍 Dashboard 时间线？

channel_push._comment: Wave 9: 把 PROACTIVE_PROPOSAL 推到 channels.<id>.proactive_chat_id 配置的聊天。urgency=high 自动加 🚨 前缀。
channel_push._min_urgency_help: 只推 urgency >= 这个等级的提案。'low' 全推、'normal' 默认、'high' 只推紧急。

daily_digest._comment: Wave 16: 每天到点生成当日活动汇总（主动发声次数 / 反思周期 / 自传记忆 / 活跃目标）。2026-05-14 default-on — 配合 channel_push 自动推到飞书做'晚报'。要关掉就 enabled=false。
daily_digest._schedule_help: cron 表达式 (需 croniter) 或 'every Nu'。默认 22:00 每天。
daily_digest._lookback_h_help: 汇总往前看多少小时的事件。

proactive._intent_engine_help: Jarvis Phase J2: 意图预测引擎。从事件流学习用户行为模式，替代固定规则触发器。enabled 隐式 true（只要 proactive.enabled=true 就启用）；加 'intent_prediction' 到 disabled_triggers 可单独关闭。

channels._consumer: lifespan (ChannelDispatcher + per-channel adapter); not in factory.py. Currently READY: feishu, telegram, slack, dingtalk, wecom (outbound-only via webhook) + ws (internal). Scaffolds (WeChat) accept config but their adapter modules raise NotImplementedError — daemon logs `adapter.start_failed` and skips.
channels._comment: B-145 / B-380 双向聊天接入。enabled=true 后 daemon 启动时拉起 adapter，在群里 @机器人 即可对话。Tools 集成 (integrations.*) 是出站通知，channels 是双向对话。

feishu._help: 飞书开放平台 → 应用 → 创建应用 → 启用 '机器人' 能力 + '订阅事件 (im.message.receive_v1)' → 复制 app_id / app_secret 填这里。WebSocket 长连模式无需公网 IP。
feishu._proactive_chat_id_help: Wave 9: 填某个聊天/群的 chat_id (形如 'oc_xxxxxx')，daemon 会把 ProactiveAgent 的主动发声（日历提醒/闲置提醒/陈旧项目）推到这个聊天里走飞书原生通知。chat_id 可以在 daemon 日志里查到：你 @ 机器人发第一条消息时会打 'channel.inbound feishu target.ref=oc_xxx'。空 → 不推送（默认）。
feishu._session_per_user_help: Wave 18: true 时同一个群里的不同用户各自一个 session (会话历史互相独立)，agent 不会把张三李四的话当成同一个对话方。false (默认) 时整个群共享一个 session — 单人/家庭群更顺手。注意：开启会「重置」现有群聊的连续性（老 session 历史还在但不会自动接上新 session）。

telegram._help: B-380: 在 Telegram 里跟 @BotFather 对话 → /newbot → 复制 token (形如 '12345:AAAA...') 填 bot_token。pip install xmclaw[channels] 装 python-telegram-bot。Long-poll 模式无需公网 IP。
telegram._allowed_user_ids_help: 非空时只接受列表里 Telegram user id 发来的消息。@userinfobot 能拿到自己的 user id (整数)。
telegram._allowed_chat_ids_help: 非空时只接受列表里 chat id (群 id / 私聊 id)。私聊 chat_id == user_id；超级群 chat_id 是负数。
telegram._parse_mode_help: Telegram 渲染模式：null = 纯文本最稳；'MarkdownV2' / 'HTML' 让 agent 输出粗体/链接，但需要正确转义否则 Telegram 拒收。

slack._help: B-382: api.slack.com/apps → 创建 App → OAuth & Permissions 里复制 'xoxb-...' 填 bot_token；Basic Information → App-Level Tokens 创建带 connections:write scope 的 token (形如 'xapp-...') 填 app_token。Socket Mode 模式无需公网 IP。pip install xmclaw[channels-slack] 装 slack-bolt。
slack._allowed_user_ids_help: 非空时只接受列表里 Slack user id (Uxxxxxxxx) 发来的消息。
slack._allowed_channel_ids_help: 非空时只接受列表里 channel id 的消息。Cxxx = 公开频道, Gxxx = 私有频道, Dxxx = DM。

dingtalk._help: B-383: open.dingtalk.com → 应用开发 → 凭证与基础信息 → 复制 client_id / client_secret 填这里。robot_code 留空时默认用 client_id（自建应用单 robot 场景）。Stream Mode (WebSocket 长连) 无需公网 IP。pip install xmclaw[channels-dingtalk] 装 dingtalk-stream。
dingtalk._allowed_user_ids_help: 非空时只接受列表里 sender_staff_id (钉钉工号) 发来的消息。
dingtalk._allowed_conversation_ids_help: 非空时只接受列表里 conversation_id 的消息（群 id / 单聊 id）。

wecom._help: B-384: 企业微信群机器人 webhook (一向出站通知；入站需要自建应用 + 公网 callback URL，v1 不支持)。在企业微信群里 → 群设置 → 群机器人 → 添加 → 复制 webhook URL 填 webhook_url。无需额外 extra (httpx 是默认依赖)。
wecom._msgtype_help: text | markdown | image | news | file (默认 markdown)。markdown 渲染规则见 https://developer.work.weixin.qq.com/document/path/91770。
wecom._mentioned_list_help: userid 列表 @人 (text msgtype only)。'@all' 特殊值代表所有人。markdown 模式想 @-mention 请在 content 里用 <@userid> 行内语法。
wecom._mentioned_mobile_list_help: 手机号列表 @人 (text msgtype only)。

email._comment: B-393 双向 email channel：IMAP 轮询入站 + SMTP 发出。仅用 stdlib (imaplib / smtplib / email)，pip install xmclaw 即可，无需额外 extra。重要：Gmail / Outlook / 163 / Yahoo 等消费级邮箱必须用 App Password (应用专用密码)，不是账户密码。Gmail App Password 见 https://support.google.com/accounts/answer/185833；163 在邮箱设置 → POP3/SMTP/IMAP 里启用并领授权码。
email._help_imap: imap_host 例：Gmail = imap.gmail.com:993，Outlook = outlook.office365.com:993，163 = imap.163.com:993，QQ = imap.qq.com:993。imap_password 留空时回落到 secrets store (key: channels.email.imap_password)。imap_processed_folder 设置后已处理的邮件会被移动到该文件夹（而不是仅标记为已读）。
email._help_smtp: smtp_use_ssl=true (默认) 使用 SMTPS (端口 465)；false 使用 STARTTLS (端口 587)。smtp_password 留空时回落到 secrets store (key: channels.email.smtp_password)。
email._allowed_senders_help: 非空时只接受列表里 sender 地址发来的邮件，比较时大小写不敏感。空 = 任何发件人均可。

integrations._consumer: lifespan (BuiltinTools.integrations.py wires *_send tools); not in factory.py. These are OUTBOUND-only (agent tools to send notifications); for INBOUND chat use 'channels' section.

feishu._comment: 群里 添加自定义机器人 → 复制 webhook URL

wecom._comment: 企业微信群机器人 webhook (个人微信无官方 API)

dingtalk._comment: 钉钉群自定义机器人 webhook

qq._comment: OneBot v11 兼容 bot 的 HTTP API base_url (go-cqhttp/NapCat/Lagrange)

hooks._help_: Wave-32 (2026-05-18): user-defined lifecycle hooks. Empty by default. Each entry: {id, event, runner, ...runner-specific...}. Events: SessionStart/End, UserPromptSubmit, PreLLM/PostLLM, PreToolUse/PostToolUse, Stop, TurnFinished, SubagentStart/Stop, MemoryWrite, PersonaUpdated, ChannelInbound/Outbound, PerceptObserved, ReflectionRan, GoalSpawned, Notification, ErrorRaised, SkillInvoked, SkillPromoted, ToolBlocked, ToolFailed (25 total). Runners: command (shell), function (Python entry-point), http (POST webhook), prompt (LLM one-shot), agent (fire-and-forget sub-agent). See docs/HOOKS.md for full reference + JSON output protocol. command/function runners require the workspace be marked trusted via 'xmclaw trust' (drops a .xmclaw-trust marker file).
